content_body:
We came for our one year anniversary and had a wonderful time. Unfortunately for us, there isn't much to do in Blue Ridge when it is raining. In terms of food we think Mercier Orchards had the best. They are a vineyard/store/restaraunt and it was fantastic. Don't forget to check out the hard cider tasting to the left when you first enter the building. If you are a cider fan I highly recommend Adele's choice and Legends! All in all our weekend spent here was great and we hope to do it again soon. Hope whoever comes after us has an amazing time. - Alexio

Also, we tried the fudge at 3 Sister's Fudge and at the Mercier Orchards and between the two places Mercier's had the best fudge and desserts so don't waste your money at 3 Sisters. Now we did get to see a waterfall called Fall Branch Falls, it was super easy to get to and the walk was short. First thing I would do when you first arrive is to go to the Chamber of Commerce as they have a lot info for places to go. We had a wonderful time, hoping we can come back during the summer. - Nikki
title: Our Wonderful One Year Anniversary
